title: papaver alpinum var. nudicaule
intro: Papaver alpinum var. nudicaule, also known as the Alpine Poppy, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum var. nudicaule include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in traditional remedies as a poultice or topical application.
